    Method
    Description
    BaseFile

    Creates or retrieves an Audio file instance associated with the specified path.
    BaseFile

    Creates or retrieves a BinaryFile instance associated with the specified path.
    BaseFile

    Creates or retrieves a file object associated with the specified path.
    BaseFile

    Creates or retrieves an Image instance associated with the specified path.
    BaseFile

    Creates or retrieves a TabularFile instance associated with the specified path.
    BaseFile
    TextFileFactory.create(String path)
    Creates or retrieves a TextFile instance associated with the specified path.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BinaryFile
    Class representing a binary file.
    class 
    Folder
    Class representing a directory capable of containing files and other folders.
    class 
    TabularFile
    Class representing a tabular file (CSV, TSV, SSV, etc.).
    class 
    TextFile
    Concrete class representing a text file (typically .txt).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Folder.add(BaseFile component)
    Adds a file or sub-folder to this folder.
    void
    Folder.remove(BaseFile component)
    Removes a file or sub-folder from this folder's internal registry.
